system.effect: The character cannot Run or Charge. They suffer −20 to all tests.
system.removal: Extended rest (typically a full night's sleep) removes the Exhausted condition. Some medical treatments or stimulants may also help.

description.value: The character is physically spent beyond mere Fatigue. They cannot Run or Charge, and suffer −20 to all tests. This condition typically results from prolonged exertion, extreme environmental conditions, or accumulating too many levels of Fatigue. Unlike Fatigue, Exhaustion does not stack — but it can exist alongside Fatigue levels, and their penalties combine.
